project_identity.name: NodeGuard GSC
project_identity.visual_style: Dark Mode Only, High Contrast, Data-Dense, Retro-Futurist

typography.rules: Use Mono font for ALL data values, tickers, and code. Use Chivo for section headers. Use Inter only for dense reading text (if any).

usage.surface: Card Backgrounds (Never use pure black for cards, use #0A0A0A)

layout.spacing: Compact. Use p-4 for cards, gap-2 or gap-4 for grid.
structure: Top Bar: Executive HUD (Logo + Key KPIs + Ticker)
- Col 4-9: MIMI Kernel Math Panel (Central Focus) + Map/Vis
- Col 10-12: Recovery Counter + Inverse Reliability Table
Bottom Bar: Data Injection & Audit Controls

cards.style: Sharp edges (rounded-sm or rounded-none), 1px border-border, bg-surface. No shadows.
cards.header: Border-bottom 1px solid border-border, p-3, uppercase mono label.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-black hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-sm font-mono uppercase font-bold tracking-wider
buttons.danger: bg-danger text-white hover:bg-danger/90 rounded-sm font-mono uppercase blink-on-critical
buttons.outline: border border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/10 rounded-sm font-mono

charts.style: Minimalist. Hide grid lines if possible. Use strokeWidth={2}. Tooltip: rounded-none border-primary bg-black text-primary.

visual_enhancers.ticker: Use react-fast-marquee for the 'Recovery Counter' and 'Live Data Feed'.
visual_enhancers.math: Use 'katex' to render LaTeX formulas (MIMI Kernel).
visual_enhancers.alerts: If utilization > 0.80, trigger 'Catastrophe Mode': Red borders, blinking indicators.

assets.instructions: Do not use stock photos. Use Phosphor Icons or Lucide Icons (technical set).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 for text. Amber on Black is accessible.

universal_guidelines: Dark Mode is MANDATORY. Do not create a light mode toggle.
Real-time feel: Use 'useEffect' intervals to simulate data updates every 3-5 seconds.
All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
PDF Export must use jsPDF to generate a 'Forensic Audit' document layout.
